Package org.eventb.internal.core.parser

  • Method Details

    • led

      public IParserPrinter.SubParseResult<R> led(Formula<?> left, ParserContext pc) throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Description copied from interface: ILedParser
      Parses a left-denoted formula from the given parser context.

      Current token is that of the operator symbol associated with this parser.

      When the method returns, current token is the one that immediately follows parsed formula.

      Parameters:
      left - an already parsed formula that occurs at the left of the operator symbol.
      pc - current parser context;
      Returns:
      the parsed formula
      Throws:
      GenParser.SyntaxError - if the there is a syntax error

    • checkAndMakeResult

      private IParserPrinter.SubParseResult<R> checkAndMakeResult(ParserContext pc, List<C> children) throws GenParser.SyntaxError
